ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the analyst */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_prices" (
  "target_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target price estimate */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the estimate is for */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the estimate */,
  "target_price" TEXT /* Target price estimate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the estimate was made */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale behind the target price estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_prices_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the estimate is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the estimate */,
  "num_analysts" INTEGER /* Number of analysts providing estimates */,
  "avg_target_price" TEXT /* Average target price of the estimates */,
  "upside_potential" TEXT /* Upside potential based on the current price and target price */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the estimate (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_estimates_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the market (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, news) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is enabled or disabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "stocks" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of stock symbols in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being valued */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the valuation (e.g., DCF, multiples) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Calculated value of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the valuation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
